reply_original:
Wow, thank you so much for the 4-star rating! We are thrilled to hear that you are enjoying Fantasia and finding it better than ever. Your support is the fuel that keeps our team going!

We are constantly working to make your experience even more magical.
reply_zh:
哇，非常感谢您的四星好评！听到您喜欢 Fantasia 并觉得它比以往任何时候都更好，我们感到非常激动。您的支持是驱动我们团队前进的动力！

我们正不断努力，致力于为您打造更加奇妙的体验。
